## Feature

What should FreeWebPanel add or improve?

## Who needs it

Admin, reseller, customer, migration user, or support operator?

## Why it matters

Explain the hosting workflow this improves.

## Safety and privacy

Mention any security, privacy, abuse, billing, or customer-data considerations.
